name: sheetgenie-backend
description: SheetGenie backend — Express API for AI-powered Excel analysis

scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/health | node -e "process.stdin.on('data',d=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);console.log(j.status==='ok'?'✅ Server healthy':'❌ Server unhealthy');process.exit(j.status==='ok'?0:1)})"
